extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters against and by each entity: all company, subsidiary, promoter, director and group-company “By” rows are excluded. Against rows counted are criminal proceedings of 2 against the Directors, statutory/regulatory actions of 31 against the Company plus 2 against the Subsidiary, and tax proceedings of 254 against the Company plus 35 against the Subsidiary; promoter and other against rows are nil. The quantified litigation amount against the Company and Subsidiary is taken from their stated totals of ₹1,615.42 million and ₹319.29 million, respectively, totaling ₹1,934.71 million, or ₹193.471 crore; the source unit is million. Contingent liabilities use the stated Total rows as of December 31, 2020: ₹1,505.07 million for the Company plus ₹45.98 million for CCVL, totaling ₹1,551.05 million, or ₹155.105 crore; conversion is ₹1 crore = ₹10 million. The only disclosed company-wide customer concentration is top 10 customers at 30.00% of the Company’s revenue from operations for Financial Year 2020; the other percentages are either interim or CCVL/segment-specific, and no company-wide top-five percentage is disclosed.
